title: Claude Mythos is FINALLY here (Fable 5)
summary: Anthropic released Claude Fable 5, its first Mythos class model, which achieves top performance on multiple benchmarks including SWE Bench Pro and Frontier Code. The model supports vision capabilities, extended context for long-running tasks, and demonstrates performance on code generation and full-stack application development.
writeup: Better Stack covers Anthropic's release of Claude Fable 5, described as the company's first Mythos class model. The video reports top performance on benchmarks including SWE Bench Pro and Frontier Code, marking the model's standing on code-focused evaluations. Takeaways include vision capabilities, extended context for long-running tasks, and demonstrated performance on code generation and full-stack application development.
